homepage.intro_body_1: Showdesigners is not an agency that hands you a catalogue of acts. We are the partner who takes your vision and transforms it into a dramaturgically complete story — one your guests will live through fully and talk about long after.
homepage.intro_body_2: Every event gets its own show designer — a single point of contact who understands your event as a whole. Not a coordinator. A dramaturg, advisor and producer in one.
homepage.intro_body_3: Behind Showdesigners stands Aliatrix — 15 years in the industry, an in-house production team, and artists who have performed on three continents.
homepage.intro_diff_1: One point of contact for the entire project — you never explain yourself twice.
homepage.intro_diff_2: We design a fully bespoke programme — with deep expertise built around your specific event.
homepage.intro_diff_3: We craft an evening with narrative and momentum — every act lands exactly where it should.
homepage.intro_diff_4: Only artists we know personally and have worked with ourselves.
homepage.step_01_body: Tell us how you want your guests to feel. Our team walks you through everything from the first call to the signed brief — no forms, no catalogues.
homepage.step_02_body: Our creative team designs the full dramaturgy of your event — not one act after another, but a story with tension and peaks that work together as a whole.
homepage.step_03_body: This is when you meet your show designer for the first time. They are physically on-site, running the entire programme and handling every detail on the ground. You enjoy the event.
homepage.how_cta_note: Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
homepage.cta_body: Tell us what kind of evening you want to create. The rest is our job.

services.intro_body_1: Every event is different — different space, different audience, different energy. That is why we never work from a template. We work from your vision and build a programme that fits it precisely.
services.intro_body_2: From the first meeting, our sales and creative team is fully dedicated to you — together we design the dramaturgy, select the artists, and refine every detail. On the day itself, your show designer runs the programme live on-site.
services.step_01_body: Reach out with your enquiry — event type, date, atmosphere, approximate budget. Or start by chatting with our AI assistant — a relaxed way to tell us as much as you like about your event, without any forms.
services.step_02_body: Our creative team designs the full dramaturgy, selects the artists and refines every detail. All communication and coordination is handled by us — you have nothing to worry about.
services.step_03_body: Your show designer is on-site from setup to the final act. Every cue runs exactly as planned.
services.type_1_body: Gala dinners, company parties, team-building events, product launches. A programme that reflects your company culture and leaves a lasting impression.
services.type_2_body: Weddings, VIP birthdays, private celebrations. Every detail choreographed for the right moment.
services.type_3_body: Supporting programmes, dramaturgical collaboration, spatial scenography. We know how to hold the attention of a large audience.
services.type_4_body: Regular or one-off entertainment for guests. A show that becomes part of the stay experience. We also handle supporting programmes for conferences and corporate gatherings.

about.story_body_1: Behind Showdesigners stands the team of Aliatrix — a visual entertainment agency with over 15 years on the Czech and Central European market. In that time, we have seen hundreds of events. And we have learned what works.
about.story_body_2: One pattern kept repeating: clients who wanted certainty. Not the lowest price, but a partner who would take full ownership of the entertainment and deliver it without compromise.
about.story_body_3: Showdesigners was our answer to that need. A consultancy layer where the client does not buy individual acts — but entrusts the entire evening's dramaturgy to one show designer, who transforms it into an experience.
about.value_1_body: We do not sell items from a catalogue. We design the full dramaturgy of your evening and take responsibility for every part of it.
about.value_2_body: No one in our network is there without us having seen them work in person. No surprises on the day.
about.value_3_body: Your show designer knows you, your event, and all the artists. You communicate with one person — never a call centre.
about.value_4_body: We work with realistic budgets and look for the best quality-to-value ratio — not the cheapest option.
about.aliatrix_body: Showdesigners is an independent brand built on the foundation of Aliatrix — a visual entertainment agency with its own production and 15 years of experience. We share the team, the artist network and the production infrastructure.
about.cta_headline: WANT TO GET TO KNOW US?

references.hero_headline_sr_only: Show design for corporate events and private celebrations.
references.cta_sub: We will design a programme precisely for you.

contact.page_subheadline: Tell us what you are planning — we will take care of the rest.
